task: Refactor execute_system_command to dynamically route shells for cross-platform execution

key_patterns_discovered: The EnvironmentProbe was already successfully gathering the required OS capabilities and injecting it into the AnalysisContext.

The limitation was purely physical execution-node routing. By natively mapping `os.platform() === 'win32'` at execution time to `/bin/bash` or `powershell.exe`, we established true zero-config topological portability.
corrections: Updated the `execute_system_command` description schema to explicitly inform the LLM that Linux uses Bash and Windows uses PowerShell, so it hallucinates the correct native path syntax depending on the `host.os` fingerprint.
